# Venn Intelligence Foundation

> Venn Intelligence Foundation is a research organization funding the first
> infrastructure protocols for human collective intelligence. We operate two
> core projects: Project Σ (decentralized collective intelligence protocol)
> and Project Ω (AI-native trading system with full development transparency).
> Founded by Taitan Pascal. Based at vennai.org.

## About
- [Homepage](https://vennai.org/): Landing page with full project overviews
- [Blog](https://vennai.org/blog): Thoughts and announcements

## Project Σ — Collective Intelligence Protocol
- Proof of Humanity: Zero-knowledge proof of unique personhood — without revealing identity
- The Σ Engine: Information-theoretic evaluation of every message's true contribution to collective intelligence
- Cognitive Topology: Multi-dimensional cognitive space where content flows from high to low potential
- Bazaar of Currencies: Fork your own tribe, issue your own token — wisdom priced by the free market

## Project Ω — AI-Native Trading Infrastructure
- Agent-Native Intelligence: LLM as primary decision maker, not a plugin
- Trigger-Driven Precision: Agent-generated conditional hooks that fire on exact market signals
- Reflection Dashboard: Transparent trade outcome and performance tracking
- Human-Agent Co-governance: Real-time Telegram integration for manual orders, status queries, and danger alerts

## Consulting
- Taitan Pascal offers formal consulting sessions ($1000/hour standard, $100/hour by invite)
- Topics: AI infrastructure, trading systems, life optimization
- Contact: contact@vennai.org

## Contact
- Email: contact@vennai.org
- Twitter: @venn_foundation
